title: Tesla postpones Model S/X Signature delivery event, leaving attendees holding the bag
summary:
Tesla has postponed its highly anticipated Signature Edition delivery event that was scheduled for May 12 at the Fremont factory. The company sent a brief email to attendees today — just three days before the event — offering no explanation and no new date.

The last-minute postponement is leaving buyers who already spent thousands of dollars on plane tickets and hotel reservations holding the bag.

more…

title: Turn your GM EV into backup battery power with a GM Energy Home System [Video]
summary:
As a homeowner, one of the most frustrating things is when the power starts to flicker and go out. How long will it last this time? Generators and battery backups are always an option, but what if you could use another asset with a massive battery – your EV – to help provide power to your properly quipped home through a blackout?

more…

title: Get real: DeepWay delivered 8,020 electric semi trucks last year
summary:
After a week of Tesla Semi grabbing headlines and stealing the show at ACT Expo, Baidu-backed DeepWay would like to remind you that they delivered 8,020 electric semi trucks in 2025 – and they’re almost ready to go public.

more…

title: Porsche announces it is abandoning its major e-bike ambitions
summary:
Porsche is pulling the plug on a major chunk of its electric bicycle ambitions, with the German automaker announcing plans to shut down its e-bike motor division and cut hundreds of jobs as it refocuses on its core sports car business.

more…

title: At under $49,000, Volkswagen’s ID.Buzz might FINALLY be priced right
summary:
Volkswagen aimed its all-electric ID.Buzz minivan squarely at an nostalgic baby boomer market that had aged out of $70,000 hippie nostalgia purchases by the time it arrived on US shores – but now VW that dealers are advertising the premium van for less than $49,000, VW’s new-age bus might be worth a second look.

more…

title: New Chevy Spark EUV is officially the best selling electric SUV in Brazil
summary:
Chevy resurrected Spark EUV nameplate with the launch of the all-new, affordable Chevy Spark EUV for 2026, with the hopes that its new, 220-mile range EV would be a “game changer” that helps accelerate the company’s EV transition in developing markets – and it’s now officially the best selling electric SUV in Brazil!

more…

title: REALLY Quick Charge with Range Energy electric trailer at ACT Expo 2026
summary:
On this really quick episode of Quick Charge, we talk to Range Energy Vice President of Product Collin MacGregor about how his electric trailer can help reduce freight costs, support the grid, and more – WITHOUT asking operators to switch trucks.

title: Kia’s midsize electric SUV spotted in the US again, but this one is different [Image]
summary:
The EV5 is about the size of Kia’s best-selling Sportage SUV and the Tesla Model Y. After opening orders in Europe and Canada, Kia’s midsize electric SUV was spotted testing in the US again, but this one looks a little different.

title: Podcast: Tesla Semi and 4680 battery, BMW iX3 price, Rivian R2 pickup, and more
summary:
In the Electrek Podcast, we discuss the most popular news in the world of sustainable transport and energy. In this week’s episode, we discuss Tesla Semi, the 4680 battery cell, BMW iX3 price, Rivian R2 pickup, and more.

Today’s episode is sponsored by GM Energy. If you want to experience more resilience and control over your home energy, the GM Energy Home System adds stationary battery power for always-ready backup energy for your home, and the GM Energy PowerBank takes in energy from the grid and stores it for when you need it most. Learn more at gmenergy.gm.com

We are also sponsored by NeuroHUD: Check out the NeuroHUD PRO featuring a true Tesla-focused HUD experience with navigation, blind-spot alerts, Autopilot status, and freely switchable display modes now on Kickstarter or Trantor Vision.com

title: SEG Solar ramps up with a new 4 GW solar factory in Texas
summary:
SEG Solar is expanding its US manufacturing footprint again, this time with a new 4-gigawatt solar module factory planned for Houston, Texas.

more…

title: This New European Electric SUV Has A Secret From China
summary: It will look German, may be built in Spain, but with Leapmotor’s EV architecture and battery tech.

title: Cadillac's EVs Are Stealing Tons Of Buyers From Other Brands
summary: Cadillac has sold more than 100,000 new EVs, and three-quarters of those buyers are new to the brand.

title: While You Stop For A 30-Minute Charge, Nio Just Swapped 1 Million EV Batteries In A Week
summary: Nio's EV battery-swapping isn't just a gimmick. The Chinese EV maker has handled over 100 million swaps to date.

title: Mercedes’ Electric C-Class Will Have Even More Range Than We Thought
summary: Mercedes says a cheaper electric C-Class with nearly 500 miles of range is coming soon.

title: Mercedes-AMG Is Building An EV For People Who Hate EVs
summary: The company says it is one of the biggest developments in AMG’s history, embodying the brand's ethos in electric form.

title: This New Tech Completely Changes How The Brake Pedal Works
summary: Brembo’s new fluid-free, brake-by-wire system is a big departure, and it’s already coming in a production car.

title: Opel Says This EV Is A True Hot Hatch. The Specs Back It Up
summary: The new Opel Corsa GSE EV has the power and the upgrades to deserve being called a hot hatch.

title: Volkswagen Says Its Latest EVs Are 70-80% As Profitable As Gas Cars
summary: VW's profit margins on EVs willl be slim until its next-generation SSP architecture arrives later this decade, its CFO said.

title: BMW Has Built Way More EVs Than You Think
summary: The Bavarian automaker just announced it has now manufactured over 2 million EVs.

title: Tesla Wants To Vacuum The Hot Air Out Of Cars To Improve Range
summary: Tesla's new patent proposes sucking hot air out of the cabin to improve cooling efficiency and range on hot summer days.
